product.name: VHC Brands Annie Buffalo Check 4PC Set 2 Oven Mitts and 2 Pot Holders
product.description: VHC Brands Annie Buffalo Check 4-Piece Kitchen Set, Grey – Bring farmhouse grace and everyday function to your kitchen with this soft grey and white check set. Includes 2 oven mitts and 2 pot holders made from 100% cotton for a comfortable grip and reliable heat protection. Perfect for rustic kitchens, this charming set blends classic style with cozy country appeal.
features: 4-PIECE SET: Includes two oven mitts and two pot holders in a stylish grey buffalo check pattern. Made from 100% soft cotton for comfortable heat protection, this farmhouse kitchen set brings timeless charm and practicality to your cooking space.

FARMHOUSE STYLE: The VHC Brands Annie Buffalo Check Grey 4-Piece Kitchen Set infuses your kitchen with classic farmhouse charm. Featuring a soft grey and white buffalo check pattern, this set adds a touch of rustic warmth and timeless elegance

OUTSTANDING HEAT RESISTANCE: These oven mitts are specially designed to endure high temperatures, made from premium flat weave cotton that provides dependable protection and comfort while handling hot pots, pans, and baking trays.
BUFFALO CHECK PATTERN: The pot holders feature a classic buffalo check pattern, adding a timeless and cozy touch to your kitchen decor.
HEAT-RESISTANT SHIELDS: These pot holders are indispensable for protecting your hands and kitchen surfaces from hot pots and pans, ensuring both safety and ease during meal preparation.
